title: Alive Mods Fabric
description: The Fabric version of Alive Mods, aimed for content creators.
body:
![Banner Image](https://i.imgur.com/isPqvzl.png) Alive Mods is a modpack focused on performance, mechanical mods, decoration, quality of life, and this version of the pack is based on fabric. ### This pack is aimed for content creators!!! If you just want to play I recommend the normal [Forge modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/alive-mods). This version of the pack is based on the Fabric mod loader. This brings some advantages, and disadvantages. **Content Advantages** - Replay Mod - Igrium's Replay Exporter - Camera Utils - Biome Spawn Point - Isometric Renders **Disadvantages** - No FancyMenu - No Create mod addons - Less Farmer's Delight addons - No new mobs (No Alex's Mobs) - No Pretty Pipes **Mod Additions** - Clutter - Chiseled Bricks - Dangerous Stone Cutter - Inventory Tabs - Other Fabric performance mods **Mod Replacements** - The forge ports of Sodium (Rubudium) were replaced with the actual Sodium. (Along with Sodium Extras, Sodium Options and Iris) - Rechiseled replaced with Chisel Refabricated - Iron Furnaces replaced with BetterFurnaces Reforged - Corpse replaced with Your Items Are Safe These are the ones I could find and the ones that make the most difference between the original modpack. But even with all those pros and cons the game-play experience is still pretty similar. This also has a beta version of Alive Textures which tweaks some building blocks and the GUI. Heres a detailed explanation to all mods and changes: **Performance**:
Performance with this pack is amazing while using Sodium. And to keep most of the optifine features we also have Lamb Dynamic Lights, Iris Shaders, Continuity (Connected Textures), and way more! **Additions**:
One of the mechanical mods I added was of course Create, which I think is one of the best mods out there.
Also don't you think Minecraft doesn't have that much food options? That's why I added Farmers Delight, so you can find wild crops, farm them and cook them into full meals. I also added some addons to that mod to add even more food.
I wanted to add more decoration, so I added a furniture mod, obviously adding tables, chairs, beds, and more. I also added some mods that add more varieties to wood and stone. Speaking of varieties, I added some mods which adds more varieties to doors, trapdoors, and fences, and you can make varieties of the normal blocks with a chisel, using Chisel Refabricated.
Since Minecraft needs better storage in my opinion, I added Iron Chests, Iron Barrels, Iron Shulkers and Iron Furnaces, which are tiered storage containers which offer more slots, and with the furnaces, the better the tier the faster it smelts, and it has augments which are like upgrades for the furnace. **Quality of Life**:
Inventory Profiles Next is a mod that adds sort buttons and other inventory/storage upgrades to Minecraft, Better advancements just makes the advancement screen bigger, "Your Items Are Safe" keeps all your items and armor inside a chest when you die, Clumps clumps up the XP orbs, and Double Doors automatically opens the 2 doors when you click on 2 doors. **World & Sounds**:
Terralith is one of the most popular world generation mods and I can see why, because the biomes are so beautiful! It is also paired with Incendium, Nullscape, and Structory which change the rest of the dimensions and adds more structures.
To make the world feel more *alive*, I added AmbientSounds, which adds wind, birds, water, and other ambient sounds which just adds way more to the feeling of Minecraft. Speaking of sounds, I added SoundPhysicsRemastered, which adds reverb to the inside of large structures. Along with all this, I also added a mod to tweak the sounds of some blocks. Those are the main changes of the modpack, there are way more mods to this pack and to see what they do, download the pack! Feel free to showcase and make content on this modpack, just please credit it! ## Guides How to Adjust Third Person Distance - Go to controls - Set "Third Person Distance Modifier" to a key - Press that key, and then you can ajust it! Default is 4. ## Alive Alive is a part of DuckyHQ. See my other projects at my website. Join my Discord to report bugs, request features, and hand out with the community. Also check out the normal forge version. It's the original version of Alive Mods. And finally, check out my resourcepack! [![Discord Link](https://i.imgur.com/T47lwtj.png)](https://discord.gg/kVS5dEekmT) [![Website Link](https://i.imgur.com/VLVP0L0.png)](https://www.duckyhq.com) [![Alive Mods Forge](https://i.imgur.com/HLAZnmb.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/alive-mods) [![Alive Textures](https://i.imgur.com/kQHAX4W.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alive-textures) ## Credits
